title: Add-free-API-providers
summary: Added free API providers (Groq 🆓, Hugging Face 🆓) to the AI Model Provider system. Updated backend models with new provider choices. Updated api_transcribe to support Groq (whisper-large-v3). Updated api_summarize to support Groq (llama3-70b) and Hugging Face (Mistral). Frontend: providers show free badges, dynamic model suggestions and API key placeholders per provider.
